members.label: cabinet
members.description: electrical outlet with visible cords on left wall near floor
members.long_form_open_description: Standard duplex electrical outlet located close to the floor on the left wall with several cords plugged in and draped on the floor toward the table and lamp. Faceplate white and slightly raised from baseboard.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: below the left light switches and thermostat; cords run toward the lamp/table
